transcript: There is no distance It cannot be covered Over and over You're not defenseless I'll be your cover, over and over, you're not defensive. I'll be your shelter, I'll be your armor. I hear you whisper underneath your breath. I hear your rest.O.S, your S.O.S I will send out an army to find you In the middle of the darkest night It's true, I will rescue you Thanks for watching! I will rescue you in the middle of the darkest night, it's true, I will rescue you, I will never stop marching to reach you, in the middle of the hardest fight, it it true. I will rescue you. Oh, I will rescue you. Thanks for watching!
